name: skorezy
description: Live football, F1, and cricket scores in your VS Code status bar — with an F1 track map, standings, and match browser. Keyless, zero setup.

skorezy.enabledSports.markdownDescription: Which sports to show. `football` and `f1` work instantly with no setup. Add `cricket` if you provide a free CricketData.org key.

skorezy.refreshIntervalSeconds.description: How often to refresh while a match is live (seconds).

skorezy.idleRefreshMinutes.description: How often to refresh when nothing is live (minutes).

skorezy.statusBarMaxLength.description: Max characters per status bar item before truncation.

skorezy.useMockData.description: Use built-in sample data when a sport has no API key. A sport with a key always shows live data.

skorezy.cricket.apiKey.markdownDescription: API key from [CricketData.org](https://cricketdata.org). When set, cricket shows live data.

skorezy.cricket.favoriteTeams.description: Preferred teams (e.g. "India"). When one is playing live, it is shown first.

skorezy.football.leagues.markdownDescription: ESPN league codes to follow (e.g. `eng.1`, `esp.1`, `uefa.champions`, `usa.1`). Leave empty for a sensible default set. No API key needed.

skorezy.football.favoriteTeams.description: Preferred football teams (e.g. "Arsenal"). Shown first when playing live.
